title: gladiolus exiguus
intro: Gladiolus exiguus is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant, belonging to the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, Gladiolus exiguus has been used in medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Gladiolus exiguus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, but it is essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal remedy.
